REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT VANKE HOLDINGS USA LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT REGARDING BOTH PRONGS OF THE ALTER EGO TEST, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE ADEQUACY OF RUNWAY'S CAPITALIZATION, VANKE'S DEGREE OF CONTROL OVER RUNWAY, THE ENTITIES' SHARED OFFICERS, VANKE'S INVOLVEMENT IN ADVISING RUNWAY ON THE SUBLEASE AND THE PRIOR LAWSUIT, AND THE INFORMATION RUNWAY PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF IN NEGOTIATING THE SUBLEASE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: JANE HONG, CSR 11975 (T: 909-831-2644, E: CSRJANE@HOTMAIL.COM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VANKE HOLDINGS USA LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Appearances: Chrain Haring of Blank Rome LLP (424.239.3400) for defendant and moving party; Stephen Boren of Boren Osher & Luftman LLP (310.322.2021) for plaintiff and responding party.

The court declines to rule on the objections as they do not affect the outcome of this motion. The matter is argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. There are triable issues of fact regarding both prongs of the alter ego test, including but not limited to, the adequacy of Runway's capitalization, Vanke's degree of control over Runway, the entities' shared officers, Vanke's involvement in advising Runway on the sublease and the prior lawsuit, and the information Runway provided to Plaintiff in negotiating the sublease. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Jane Hong, CSR 11975 (T: 909-831-2644, E: CSRJane@hotmail.com) (501/CFH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Vanke Holding Usa Llcs Further Responses And Compliance With Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Matthew Tom, Esq. Stephen Boren, Esq. 310-322-2021 x234 BOL Law for Plaintiff.
Craig Haring, Esq. 424-239-3481 Blankrome for Defendant.
Court reporter: Michelle Cooper, CSR #13572, 562-279-5792, mgraciano@elitesteno.com

ARGUED. Mr. Boren contests the tentative ruling and presents arguments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ZIFF DAVIS, LLC.'s Motion To Compel Defendant Vanke Holding Usa Llcs Further Responses And Compliance With Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Ziff Davis, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant Vanke Holdings USA LLC's Further Responses And Compliance With Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
